title: Params for session.terminate
description: Canonical parameters when invoking session.terminate. The session_type discriminates between layer-3/4 flow drops (firewall clear-session), VPN tunnel kills (GlobalProtect / AnyConnect / SSL-VPN), and Zero Trust app session disconnect (ZPA / Cloudflare Access / Netskope ZTNA). Connectors document which session_types they support; orchestrators must not assume any single session_type is universally available.

session_type.description: flow: TCP/UDP flow at the firewall layer. vpn: IPsec/SSL VPN tunnel. ztna: Zero Trust app session.

gateway.description: Optional VPN gateway identifier (PAN-OS GP gateway name, etc.). Only meaningful for session_type='vpn'.

app_id.description: Optional ZTNA app identifier when scoping the disconnect to a specific app rather than all sessions for the user.
